name: Wizdi AI Studio
description: AI-powered Learning Management System (LMS) with lesson creation, quizzes, student/teacher modes, intelligent dashboard, and tester feedback loop system.

deployment.staging: Feature branches deployed to staging Vercel URLs

implementation.tool: AntiGravity IDE with Claude Code plugin
implementation.phase: Bug fixes + UX refinement + Feedback loop system
implementation.tech_stack: React 18 + TypeScript 5 + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Firebase (202 Cloud Functions)

tasks.name: UX Text Labels & Navigation
tasks.description: Standardize UI text, improve menu navigation clarity, fix inconsistent labels across lesson builder, quiz engine, dashboard
tasks.note: ✅ i18n system deployed (Hebrew + English). ReferenceExamUpload fully localized. ARIA labels added for accessibility. Remaining: Apply i18n to other components.

tasks.name: File Upload System
tasks.description: Fix timeout issues, implement proper size validation, add progress indicators, handle error scenarios gracefully
tasks.note: ✅ COMPLETE - Upload timeout (60s) ✅ Retry logic (max 3) ✅ File size validation (50MB) ✅ Error handling ✅ All deployed to production (commit b3da48f)

tasks.name: Image Handling
tasks.description: Fix aspect ratios, add loading states, optimize for different screen sizes, improve lazy loading

tasks.name: Dashboard Analytics
tasks.description: Student progress tracking, teacher performance insights, pedagogical audit integration

tasks.name: Feedback Loop System - Chat Widget
tasks.description: React chat widget component embedded in app (staging + production). Allows Adva & testers to report issues without knowing code.
tasks.note: ✅ COMPLETE - FeedbackChat.tsx + FeedbackChatWrapper.tsx live, integrated with Firestore (qa_chat collection), real-time sync working.

architecture.features: User ID detection, message history, real-time sync

subtasks.name: Chat Widget UI & Layout
subtasks.description: React component with Tailwind styling, message display, input form, toggle button

subtasks.name: Firestore Integration
subtasks.description: Connect widget to Firestore, create feedback_sessions collection, real-time sync

tasks.name: Feedback Loop System - Agent Polling & Processing
tasks.description: Cron agent (polling every 5-10 minutes) reads feedback messages, analyzes them, asks clarifying questions, understands code issues.
tasks.note: ✅ COMPLETE - feedbackLoopAgent.ts + messageProcessor.ts live, polling logic functional, analysis working.

architecture.trigger: Cloud Scheduler (5-minute interval) or manual HTTP endpoint
architecture.processing: Message analysis, clarification logic, GitHub code reading prep

subtasks.name: Agent Polling Service
subtasks.description: Create polling loop that fetches unprocessed messages from Firestore

subtasks.name: Message Analysis & Classification
subtasks.description: Analyze feedback, classify issues, determine if clarification needed

subtasks.name: Clarification Q&A
subtasks.description: Post clarifying questions back to chat, await Adva's response

tasks.name: Feedback Loop System - GitHub & Staging Deploy
tasks.description: Agent reads GitHub code, identifies affected files, makes surgical fixes, commits to feature branch, deploys to Vercel staging.
tasks.note: ✅ COMPLETE - githubService.ts live with API methods (getFileContent, createBranch, commitChanges, createPullRequest).

architecture.github: GitHub API integration, feature branch creation, commit & push
architecture.ci_cd: GitHub Actions runs automatically (TS check, ESLint, Jest, build)
architecture.deployment: Vercel auto-deploys feature branches to staging URLs
architecture.notification: Agent posts staging URL to chat

subtasks.name: GitHub API Integration
subtasks.description: Read file content, search codebase, create branches, commit changes

subtasks.name: Code Fix Generation
subtasks.description: Analyze issue, identify fix location, generate minimal surgical changes

subtasks.name: CI/CD Integration & Staging Deploy
subtasks.description: Wait for GitHub Actions to pass, confirm Vercel deploy, get staging URL

tasks.name: Feedback Loop System - Approval & Production
tasks.description: Adva tests fix on staging, approves, agent merges to main → production deploy. Eyal notified via Telegram.
tasks.note: ✅ COMPLETE - telegramService.ts live with notifications (notifyFixDeployed, notifyCompletion, askForGuidance).

architecture.testing_cycle: Adva tests on staging, reports in chat (approve/reject/new issue)
architecture.merge: Merge feature branch → main via GitHub API
architecture.notification: Telegram alert to Eyal when complete

subtasks.name: Approval Loop Handler
subtasks.description: Wait for Adva test feedback, iterate if needed, merge when approved

subtasks.name: Telegram Notifications
subtasks.description: Notify Eyal when fix is live, include issue details & branch

subtasks.name: Error Handling & Recovery
subtasks.description: Handle CI/CD failures, escalation to Eyal for strategic decisions

summary.work_completed_today: 13 production commits: 5 bug fixes + 7 i18n implementation + 1 governance protocol

next_steps: Task 1 (Chat Widget): In progress via Claude Code
Task 2 (Firestore): Ready to start after Task 1
Tasks 3-8: Queued, awaiting completion of previous tasks
